system.powerDescription:
You join your compatriots in rot. As part of any action, you may sink into any shadow or body of water/mud that you are able to fit both feet inside of and instantly reemerge at any other qualifying point that you can see within CAT+1 range. 

Any object you are holding or wearing may warp with you, however, you cannot transport any other living creature with you during this. 

Gain or grant +1D next time you or an ally take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll whilst active.
